creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Jarrod,

The OPTIONS format has changed.
See: http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/makefile-options.html

Here is an updated patch for Makefile:

http://people.freebsd.org/~bdrewery/patch-nagios-plugins-optionsng.txt
<http://people.freebsd.org/%7Ebdrewery/patch-nagios-plugins-optionsng.txt>

The IPV6_DESC is in Mk/bsd.options.desc.mk, so not needed here.

Bryan
